name: Full Compound Cascade (Flagship)
description: VOC rising in Zone C + an unrevalidated hot-work permit in Zone D + overdue vapor-recovery maintenance + workers present in Zone D + a silently skipped Zone K inerting cycle — structurally mirrors historical Incident 10.
purpose: Flagship scenario — 5 independent sources, no single sensor sees the whole picture

extra_fields.work_description: Grinding on blending line support bracket, Zone C/D boundary

steps.note: Hot work permit issued clean at shift start.
Contractors present in Zone D for the active hot work.
Operators also present on routine blending-line duties.
Vapor-recovery blower overdue maintenance — pre-existing condition now entering the picture.
VOC-CONC beginning a Warning-range drift as an EO transfer proceeds with degraded vapor recovery.
Zone K inerting cycle silently skipped — unrelated maintenance interrupted the purge, and it was logged complete anyway.
VOC-CONC crosses into Critical — five independent signals now active simultaneously across Zones C, D and K.
